entities.name: SOUTHERN MALI
entities.description: The region in Mali where the farm system re-design study was conducted

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: The financial gain of the farmers which the study aimed to improve

entities.name: FOOD SELF-SUFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of the farm to provide its own food requirements

entities.name: CYCLICAL LEARNING MODEL
entities.description: A three-step iterative process involving co-design, on-farm testing, and participatory ex-ante analysis

entities.name: CO-DESIGN
entities.description: The first step of the cyclical learning model involving the creation of crop/livestock technical options

entities.name: ON-FARM TESTING
entities.description: The second step of the cyclical learning model used for the appraisal of technical options

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY EX-ANTE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The third step of the cyclical learning model used to analyze re-designed farm systems

entities.name: FARM TYPE
entities.description: Classification of farms based on resource endowment, such as HRE-LH, HRE, MRE, and LRE

entities.name: GROSS MARGIN
entities.description: A financial metric used to assess the economic performance of the farm systems

entities.name: SOIL TYPE
entities.description: An environmental factor that defines specific niches within the farm

entities.name: PREVIOUS CROP
entities.description: An agricultural factor that defines specific niches within the farm

entities.name: NICHE
entities.description: Specific combinations of soil type and previous crop where certain options perform better

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop used in intercropping systems to increase gross margin

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in intercropping or as a replacement for sorghum

entities.name: STALL FEEDING
entities.description: A livestock management practice combined with intercropping to increase gross margin

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop that was replaced by soyabean or cowpea to increase gross margin

entities.name: SOYABEAN
entities.description: A legume crop used to replace sorghum to increase gross margin

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops together, specifically maize and cowpea
